The following events took place in '''188 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Kibh Jeen]] fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="LFCG">The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that [[Kibh Jeen]] fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] 156 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore be deduced that Jeen's fall took place in 188 BBY.</ref>
*A [[Dark Jedi Conflict]] began on [[Genarius]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].<ref name="LFCG" />
*[[Treaty of Vors]] was signed on 4:18.<ref name="Hnn-Today in History">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52||Today in History}}</ref>

==Battles==
*[[Battle of Genarius (Dark Jedi Conflict)|Battle of Genarius]]<ref name="LFCG" />

==Deaths==
*[[Qornah]] on [[Almas]]<ref name="Jedi vs Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
